## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or real client data (domains, tenants, emails, keys) — placeholders only
- [ ] Scripts still parse / run in my environment (describe below)
- [ ] Kept it config-driven (no hardcoded per-client values)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) if user-facing
- [ ] Updated docs (README / METHODOLOGIE) if behavior changed
